{"id":2,"date":"2016-09-11T21:57:54","date_gmt":"2016-09-11T21:57:54","guid":{"rendered":"https://quantumsf.org/?page_id=2"},"modified":"2021-09-28T12:05:12","modified_gmt":"2021-09-28T19:05:12","slug":"about-us","status":"publish","type":"page","link":"https://quantumsf.org/","title":{"rendered":"About Us"},"content":{"rendered":"

The Quantum Dojo is a nonprofit community studio offering martial arts classes for all ages focused on self-actualization, total body healing, and strength. Our goal is to help people tap into their potential, seeking balance and grace through movement, while establishing a strong foundation of integrity and self-discipline that will facilitate personal and professional success.

In the spirit of this mission, we offer martial arts classes for adults and martial arts classes for kids, as well as community events such as rolling & falling for cyclists workshops and self-defense classes.
